Think through what you truly care about and how you want to be treated. Meanwhile, use this time to strengthen your skills, organize your portfolio, and maintain key connections. Preparation done during a low year turns directly into results when the next opportunity arrives.

neutral.source: Sutra of Lunar Mansions, Chapter 8, Seven Luminaries Day Rulership (Seven Luminaries and Five Elements)
neutral.classic: Chapter 8 gives the luminary/five-element correspondences. Neutral years carry no strong generating or conflicting pull and rely on self-management.
neutral.editorial_note: Editor adaptation of five-element and Kuyou-cycle material into annual career guidance.
items: Neutral stem-branch under the Five Elements (Seven Luminaries, T21 p.391c)—your career performance depends on your own level of investment. No windfalls this year, but no unforeseeable obstacles either. Set clear quarterly goals and advance them steadily. Best used for accumulating skills, building long-term competitiveness, and deepening your expertise.

Neutral stem-branch under the Five Elements (Seven Luminaries, T21 p.391c)—the workplace environment is stable this year with few external disruptions. Use this quiet period for things that require focus: earning certifications, writing professional articles, organizing your portfolio. These investments with no immediate payoff will suddenly prove useful at some point in the future.

generating.source: Sutra of Lunar Mansions, Chapter 8, Seven Luminaries Day Rulership (Seven Luminaries and Five Elements)
generating.classic: Chapter 8 gives the luminary/five-element correspondences. Generating years are read as external support nourishing the natal element.
generating.editorial_note: Editor adaptation of five-element and Kuyou-cycle material into annual relationship guidance.
items: Generating year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—love fortune is strong. Romantic prospects are plentiful and high-quality, giving you a sense of "finally meeting the right person." But do not let the smooth sailing make you skip the process of truly getting to know someone—good relationships need time to confirm. Those in relationships may want to plan a wedding or accomplish something meaningful together.

Generating year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—you will feel supported and understood in your relationship this year. Your partner is more willing to accommodate you, and friends may proactively introduce you to someone. Make the most of this good fortune, but remember to give as well. Love is a two-way street—the goodwill you receive needs to come back in some form.

weakening.source: Sutra of Lunar Mansions, Chapter 8, Seven Luminaries Day Rulership (Seven Luminaries and Five Elements)
weakening.classic: Chapter 8 gives the luminary/five-element correspondences. Weakening years are read as the natal element feeding outward and dispersing energy.
weakening.editorial_note: Editor adaptation of five-element and Kuyou-cycle material into annual relationship guidance.
items: Weakening year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—relationships need more intentional effort this year. You may neglect your partner due to work, or lose interest in socializing because your energy is low. But relationships do not pause just because you are busy. Reserve at least one uninterrupted block of time each week for the people who matter. Singles do not need to rush into dating—get your own state right first.

Weakening year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—those in relationships should watch communication quality. You may speak more bluntly when tired, and your partner may not realize you are just exhausted rather than uncaring. Say things kindly. When words are not enough, talk face to face. Showing vulnerability in a relationship is not losing—it is letting the other person know you need them.

kyo.source: T21 chapter 8 seven-luminary material + later temple-transmission Kuyou cycle
kyo.classic: T21 chapter 8 explains the luminaries and their elemental qualities. The yearly Kuyou cycle itself belongs to later temple transmission.
kyo.editorial_note: Editor adaptation of five-element and Kuyou-cycle material into annual relationship guidance.
items: An inauspicious star year in the Nine Luminaries cycle (Sukuyodo temple tradition)—the best strategy in love this year is "do not stir things up." Avoid making major relationship decisions this year—your emotions during a low period can distort how you see the relationship. Reassess when your state of mind stabilizes for a more objective view. Those in relationships should just treat each other well. When fights happen, leave the room first and talk after cooling down. Singles do not need to rush—focus on taking care of yourself, and when your state is right, you will naturally attract the right person.

An inauspicious star year in the Nine Luminaries cycle (Sukuyodo temple tradition). What you need most in love this year is someone who makes you feel safe. That does not have to be a romantic partner—it could be family, close friends, anyone whose presence makes the world feel less bleak. Proactively stay in touch with these people. When you are tired, call them. On weekends, meet up for a meal. Do not carry everything alone, and do not feel embarrassed about leaning on someone. For those in relationships, treat your partner as a teammate rather than an audience this year—facing things together is more effective than bearing them alone.

No dramatic twists, but there will be small moments of joy in everyday interactions. Those in relationships should focus on the basics: eating well together, talking well, resting well. Singles do not need to be anxious, but do not close yourself off either—maintain your normal social frequency.

Neutral stem-branch under the Five Elements (Seven Luminaries, T21 p.391c). This year's theme in love is "quality over quantity." Deep exchanges are more valuable than frequent dates. Understanding a person's character matters more than their external conditions. If you want a lasting relationship, this year's stable environment is ideal for building one slowly.

items: Generating year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—health fortune is good. A great year for improving your physical condition. If you want to lose weight, build muscle, or address a chronic minor issue, results will be more visible this year. Recovery is also better—even if you occasionally skip sleep or break routine, you bounce back faster. But do not take that as permission to abuse your body.

Generating year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—energy is abundant this year and fatigue comes less easily. But this good condition needs to be channeled correctly—burn off excess energy through regular exercise rather than overtime. Good time to try a new sport or increase your exercise frequency from three times a week to four or five.

items: Weakening year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—health is this year's highest-priority item. Energy flowing outward makes you tire more easily than usual, and immunity may dip slightly. Colds, allergies, and digestive issues may be more frequent. Strongly recommended: ensure seven to eight hours of sleep per night and cut back on caffeine and alcohol. Do not push through—your body's signals are more accurate than your willpower.

Weakening year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—your body is reminding you of debts owed. Fatigue accumulated from years of high-intensity operation may surface all at once this year. Do not be alarmed—your body is self-repairing. Work with what your body needs: rest when you need rest, see a doctor when you need a doctor. Recover well this year, and you will have the capital to sprint in the future.

items: An inauspicious star year in the Nine Luminaries cycle (Sukuyodo temple tradition)—health needs more proactive attention than usual this year. Your body recovers more slowly during a low year, so prevention matters more than treatment. Sleep seven hours per night, eat three proper meals, walk at least thirty minutes per week—these basics are your best protection. If symptoms appear, see a doctor early. Do not put it off. Schedule a full checkup this year: if there is something, catch it early; if there is nothing, rest easy. Taking care of your body is the foundation for facing everything else.

An inauspicious star year in the Nine Luminaries cycle (Sukuyodo temple tradition). This year's stress will show up directly in your body. Insomnia, migraines, digestive issues, unexplained fatigue—your body is telling you to stop. Do not push through. When you are tired, rest. When you cannot handle it, ask for help. Reduce caffeine and alcohol—they provide short-term energy but drain your recovery capacity long-term. Find a fixed relaxation ritual: a bath, a walk, music—whatever works. Give yourself thirty minutes each day to think about absolutely nothing. When your body holds up, everything else is negotiable.

No major concerns, but do not let that become an excuse to slack on your routine. Think of health management as a long-term investment—every bit of effort you put in this year will pay off over the next several years. Set regular exercise times, improve your diet, and maintain adequate sleep.

Neutral stem-branch under the Five Elements (Seven Luminaries, T21 p.391c). Your body will not give you many warnings this year, so you need to proactively check in. Weigh yourself regularly, track sleep quality, and observe changes in your skin and energy levels. These daily micro-adjustments reflect your health status more accurately than a once-a-year checkup.

items: Generating year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—financial luck is strong. Good opportunities to increase income this year: raises, bonuses, side income, or investment returns. But "opportunities exist" does not mean they land in your lap automatically. You need to actively pursue them—negotiate your salary when the time is right, push for project bonuses. At the same time, control spending. Do not spend more just because you earn more. Save or invest the extra income in appreciating assets.

Generating year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—money may flow in from unexpected channels this year. Stay open-minded and do not reject unconventional earning opportunities. Of course, if something sounds too good to be true, take time to verify before acting. Legitimate opportunities are genuinely more plentiful this year.

items: Weakening year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—prepare mentally for spending more and saving less. You will not lose money, but the places you need to spend are more than expected: repairs, medical expenses, social obligations, or unavoidable upgrades. Set aside a reserve fund in advance so you are not caught off guard. Save where you can, but do not cut where you should not.

Weakening year under the Seven Luminaries (T21 Fascicle 4 p.391c)—not a good year for high-risk investments or impulsive large purchases. Focus on "not losing" rather than chasing high returns. Steadily protecting existing assets matters more. If you must make financial decisions, consult a professional rather than going by gut feeling.

items: An inauspicious star year in the Nine Luminaries cycle (Sukuyodo temple tradition)—the core financial strategy this year is "steady." Avoid borrowing, avoid investments you are unsure about, and take extra time to verify before making major financial decisions. A low year has more environmental interference, making impulsive money decisions more likely. Giving yourself more thinking time will not hurt. Keep as much cash on hand as possible—prepare at least six months of living expenses as a safety cushion. If you have existing investment positions, do not add more and do not panic-sell. Maintain the status quo. This year's goal is not making money—it is holding steady.

An inauspicious star year in the Nine Luminaries cycle (Sukuyodo temple tradition). You may encounter unexpected expenses this year: car breaks down, appliances need replacing, medical treatment needed, a friend asks to borrow money. Get your reserve fund ready in advance so you do not panic when it happens. Do not spend money you do not have to spend; delay payments you can delay. If someone pitches you insurance, mutual funds, or any financial product, just say "let me think about it" and push the decision to next year. Protecting your wallet during a low year matters more than anything.

Do not expect explosive financial growth this year, but steady, consistent accumulation adds up to a respectable sum by year-end.

Neutral stem-branch under the Five Elements (Seven Luminaries, T21 p.391c). Financial luck this year is average—income is proportional to effort. Want to earn more? Do more. No shortcuts. Focus on improving your earning ability: skill upgrades that lead to raises, a portfolio that creates side opportunities. The returns on these investments are more reliable than any financial trick.
